scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5005 --reload
scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/api && source venv/bin/activate && python worker.py
scripts.dev:flower: cd apps/api && source venv/bin/activate && celery -A app.core.celery_app flower --port=5555
